message:
feat(vdbe,core): implement INSERT RETURNING column reads (bd-3065)

Replace the rowid-only RETURNING stub with proper column emission.
Add emit_returning helper that uses SeekRowid + emit_column_reads to
read requested RETURNING columns from the just-inserted row. Update
connection.rs INSERT dispatch to return VDBE result rows when RETURNING
is present, and route INSERT...SELECT through the VDBE path for
RETURNING support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
